column1: # Pre-registered prospective class predictions for ongoing/recent cognition trials.
# Each row: a class-prognostic-prior prediction for a REAL trial
# prediction_date. predicted_outcome follows ONLY from the drug's mechanism-class
# historical track record (the validated class prior) — no trial-specific tuning.
# status: RESOLVED (read out; actual_outcome filled) | PENDING (awaiting readout).
# RESOLVED rows that post-date the original 31-drug ledger curation are
# out-of-sample confirmations; PENDING rows are genuinely prospective and
# falsifiable. nct_verified: Y if the NCT was confirmed on clinicaltrials.gov in
# this session; PROGRAM if cited by trial-program name + peer-reviewed readout.
# Sources are real and citable; reconcile NCTs before OSF lock.
